message:
test: add tracked MPSC and obligation lifecycle E2E tests (bd-275by)

Comprehensive E2E coverage for the obligation-tracked channel and
oneshot primitives, exercising commit/abort/cancel/leak paths under
the lab replay runtime with deterministic seeds.

e2e_messaging.rs (4 new tests):
- e2e_tracked_mpsc_commit_with_lab_replay: reserve → send → recv with
  replay trace capture; verify value=42 delivered and proof kind is
  SendPermit
- e2e_tracked_mpsc_abort_with_lab_replay: reserve → abort; verify
  receiver gets RecvError::Disconnected
- e2e_tracked_mpsc_cancel_mid_reserve: fill channel, block on second
  reserve, cancel region mid-wait; verify SendError::Cancelled
- e2e_tracked_mpsc_leak_detection_panics: #[should_panic] test that
  dropping a tracked permit without commit/abort triggers
  "OBLIGATION TOKEN LEAKED"

runtime_e2e.rs (4 new tests using TestHarness):
- e2e_obligation_tracked_channel_commit: tracked_channel reserve →
  send → recv; verify value, proof kind, quiescence, zero pending
  obligations
- e2e_obligation_tracked_oneshot_abort: tracked_oneshot reserve →
  abort; verify receiver gets RecvError::Closed, zero pending
  obligations
- e2e_obligation_cancel_mid_reserve: fill channel, cancel region
  during blocked reserve; verify SendError::Cancelled, zero pending
- e2e_obligation_token_leak_detection: GradedScope with into_raw()
  leak; verify scope.close() returns Err

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
